title: baphia dewevrei subsp. marceliana
intro: Baphia dewevrei subsp. marceliana, also known as Marceliana bean, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family, native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating wounds. Herbal preparations of Baphia dewevrei subsp. marceliana often involve boiling the roots or leaves in water to create a decoction for medicinal purposes.
